name: Organic Bananas
description: Sweet and perfectly ripe organic bananas. Great source of potassium and natural energy.

name: Fresh Strawberries
description: Hand-picked sweet strawberries, perfect for smoothies, desserts, or snacking.

name: Avocados
description: Creamy Hass avocados, ripe and ready to eat. Perfect for guacamole or toast.

name: Baby Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, pre-washed and ready for salads or cooking.

name: Red Bell Peppers
description: Crisp, sweet red bell peppers. Excellent for roasting, salads, or stir-fry.

name: Whole Milk
description: Farm-fresh whole milk with rich, creamy taste. Vitamin D fortified.

name: Free-Range Eggs
description: Large free-range eggs from pasture-raised hens. Rich golden yolks.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick and creamy plain Greek yogurt. High in protein, perfect with fruit.

name: Sharp Cheddar
description: Aged sharp cheddar cheese with bold, complex flavor. Great for snacking or cooking.

name: Sourdough Loaf
description: Artisan sourdough bread with crispy crust and tangy flavor. Baked fresh daily.

name: Croissants
description: Buttery, flaky French croissants made with real butter. Perfect with coffee.

name: Blueberry Muffins
description: Moist blueberry muffins with a golden crumb topping. Made with real blueberries.

name: Orange Juice
description: 100% pure squeezed orange juice. No added sugar or preservatives.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: Smooth, bold cold brew coffee steeped for 20 hours. Low acidity.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Naturally carbonated sparkling mineral water. Zero calories, refreshing taste.

name: Mixed Nuts
description: Roasted and lightly salted premium mixed nuts. Almonds, cashews, pecans, and walnuts.

name: Dark Chocolate Bar
description: 72% cacao dark chocolate. Rich, intense flavor with smooth finish.

name: Tortilla Chips
description: Stone-ground yellow corn tortilla chips. Lightly salted, perfectly crispy.

name: Atlantic Salmon
description: Fresh Atlantic salmon fillet. Rich in omega-3, perfect for grilling or baking.

name: Chicken Breast
description: Boneless, skinless chicken breast. Antibiotic-free, hormone-free.

name: Ground Beef
description: 85% lean ground beef. Grass-fed, perfect for burgers, tacos, or pasta.

name: Honey
description: Raw, unfiltered wildflower honey. Locally sourced from small-batch apiaries.

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil from Mediterranean olives. Rich and fruity.

name: Basmati Rice
description: Premium aged basmati rice. Long-grain, aromatic, and fluffy when cooked.
